completionPosture: The strategy plan authorizes the platform-agent authority-routing artifact cluster while durable product truth remains blocked until downstream SOG execution and promotion evidence.
forbiddenClaims: platform agent may manually author durable authority without conveyor evidence
provider candidate grants authority by itself
strategy plan is durable product truth
resolver owns provider invocation or governance meaning

acceptedClaims: platform agents may coordinate, inspect, report, suggest, review, and monitor
durable authority created by a platform agent is invalid unless backed by conveyor source, manifest, handoff packet, and receipt
provider output remains candidate-only until hardening
strategy authority authorizes artifact projection but does not bless behavior
future policy, gate, SOG, and schema targets remain projected until materialized by their own conveyor lane

promotionBar: provider evidence exists before candidate hardening
Gemini failure is receipted before OpenAI fallback is accepted
OpenAI fallback candidate is receipt-bound and candidate-only
strategy plan is promoted only after guardrails pass
artifact manifest bounds every projected JSON path
strategy authority does not create durable product truth

sourceStory.text: As a Defracto platform operator, I want platform-agent-created durable authority to be invalid unless it is backed by conveyor source, manifest, handoff packet, and receipt, so that agents coordinate through the conveyor instead of manually authoring semantic authority.

strategyIntent: authorize the artifact cluster that enforces platform-agent authority creation through conveyor-backed source, manifest, handoff packet, and receipt

traceQuestions.whichSogOwnsBehavior: Future authority-routing behavior remains blocked until its own SOG lane executes and promotes it.
traceQuestions.whichStoryRequiredThis: The operator story captured by the conveyor-owned story/run bootstrap.
